message: ci: avoid commit intake ledger conflicts

files.patch:
@@ -178,12 +178,13 @@ jobs:
           set -euo pipefail
           git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
           git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
-          git add jobs results docs/repair/README.md repair-apply-report.json
+          git add jobs results
           if git diff --cached --quiet; then
             echo "No intake ledger changes"
             exit 0
           fi
           git commit -m "chore: record commit finding intake"
+          git restore --worktree -- docs/repair/README.md repair-apply-report.json
           for _attempt in 1 2 3; do
             if git pull --rebase && git push; then
               exit 0
